figures.caption:
Figure 2 presents a schematic of the experimental apparatus. A
Ti:sapphire oscillator is used in combination with a single-stage
regenerative ampliﬁer, delivering sub-45 fs pulses at a repetition
rate of 4 kHz, which are centred at a wavelength of 790 nm (red),
with an energy of 2.5 mJ per pulse. Af

of circularly-polarized HHG. The coherence lengths shown in
Fig. 1b are calculated for Δn1 and Δn2 that optimize phase-matching
for the 28th harmonic. As expected, the q = 3m + 1 harmonics are
